meta.title: Create Consistent Character AI Talking Videos from a Single Image!
meta.description:
Create Consistent Character AI Talking Videos from a Single Image!
Try OpenArt 👉  http://openart.ai/home/?ref=dan
Use code DAN20 for 20% off

This consistent character ai tool is amazing! In this video I show you how to make consistent ai characters than can talk by using OpenArt & Kling AI. I'm truly amazed by how good OpenArt is, you can almost do everything with it when it comes to image generation. 

This tutorial demonstrates:
1. How to Create a an image through OpenArt  
2. How to make a consistent character,  using OpenArt
3. How to upscale your images for the best result
4. How to generate text to speech for your ai voice over
5. How to create a talking avatar using Kling

Make sure to follow every step so you don't waste your credits.

Tools used:
OpenArt  - http://openart.ai/home/?ref=dan
Kling 1.6 - https://klingai.com/
Elevenlabs - https://try.elevenlabs.io/xqcc79bobkez


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.
